rules.name: Duplicate material shading networks should be reviewed
rules.message: Multiple materials share the same shading-network fingerprint.
rules.why: Duplicate material graphs increase scene complexity, memory use, and lookdev review cost. Reporting content-identical networks helps consolidate redundant shaders when assignments allow.

rules.name: Duplicate scan budget exceeded for large scenes
rules.message: Scene exceeds duplicate-scan material or texture budget; duplicate detection may be truncated.
rules.why: Large scenes can contain hundreds of materials and thousands of texture nodes. Capping duplicate scans keeps validation responsive while still reporting duplicates inside the scanned subset.
